name: egc
description: Battle-tested Codex workflows — 228 shared EGC skills, production-ready MCP configs, and selective-install-aligned conventions for TDD, security scanning, code review, and autonomous development.

interface.shortDescription: 228 battle-tested EGC skills plus MCP configs for TDD, security, code review, and autonomous development.
interface.longDescription: Extended Global Context (EGC) is a community-maintained collection of Codex-ready skills and MCP configs evolved over 10+ months of intensive daily use. It covers TDD workflows, security scanning, code review, architecture decisions, operator workflows, and more — all in one installable plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use the tdd-workflow skill to write tests before implementation.
Use the security-review skill to scan for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities.
Use the verification-loop skill to verify correctness before shipping changes.
